details.reasoning: Implementation successfully meets all rubric requirements. (1) Package directory created at packages/generator-rest-api with proper package.json referencing @prisma/generator, @prisma/generator-helper, @prisma/dmmf dependencies. (2) Entry point bin.ts correctly implements generatorHandler with both onManifest and onGenerate callbacks from Prisma generator protocol. (3) RestApiGenerator class properly reads DMMF and iterates over models. (4) For each model, comprehensive generation of: TypeScript interface (generateModelInterface.ts), CreateInput/UpdateInput types (generateInputTypes), WhereUniqueInput (generateWhereUniqueInput.ts), and CRUD interface with all five methods (findMany, findUnique, create, update, delete) with proper typing. (5) Output correctly written to generator output directory via fs.promises.writeFile. (6) Code follows TypeScript conventions, uses proper @prisma/* types, includes comprehensive test suite (11 test cases), and matches monorepo structure. Minor deduction: PLAN.md file is empty/placeholder, though not explicitly required by rubric. Implementation is polished, well-organized with separated concerns, and properly integrated into monorepo build system.
